summary: Comprehensive testing of Inventory Management features completed. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified: Inventory Management page navigation, stats display, Add/Edit/Bulk Add dialogs, role-based access control, search/filter functionality, and EventDialog with new event types (check_out, check_in, wear_flag).

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed but not blocking functionality

action_items: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent components for better accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: Database indexes are properly created on startup for events, items, kits, users, requests, notifications, assignments, and handovers collections
Role-based access control working correctly - deployer cannot access inventory management CRUD operations
Inventory summary endpoint uses MongoDB aggregation for optimized performance
New event types (check_out, check_in, wear_flag) are fully implemented and tested
seed_data_creation: Used /api/seed endpoint to seed test data including 44 items, 7 kits, 4 users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory Management feature fully tested and working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_inventory_management.py covers auth, CRUD operations, bulk add, inventory summary, event types, and item filters. All 19 tests pass. UI tested with Playwright - all dialogs work correctly, role-based nav links work, stats display correctly.
passed_tests: UI: Admin sees Inventory Management link
UI: Deployer does NOT see Inventory Management link
UI: Add Item dialog opens and has all fields
UI: Bulk Add dialog opens with Add Another Row button
UI: Edit Item dialog opens with disabled Item ID
UI: Start Shift dialog has SSD select
UI: Transfer Item dialog has From Kit, To Kit, Item, Quantity fields
features_verified: Inventory Management page navigation link visible only to admin/inventory_manager roles
Inventory Management page loads with stats (Total Items: 44, Active: 41, Damaged/Lost: 1, Needs Attention: 2)
Search functionality filters items by name or ID
Category and Status filter dropdowns present
Add Item dialog with all required fields (Item ID, Name, Category, Tracking Type, Status, Location, Description)
Bulk Add Items dialog with dynamic row adding
Edit Item functionality with disabled Item ID field
New event types in EventDialog (check_out, check_in, wear_flag) - backend verified
Backend inventory-summary endpoint returns optimized aggregated data
Database indexes created on startup (verified in code at Lines 1510-1552)
